final:
module top_module (
	input a,
	input b,
	input cin,
	output sum,
	output cout);

	assign {cout, sum} = a + b + cin;
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      sum <= ~a & ~b & ~cin; cout <= a & b | a & cin | b & cin;
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: sum <= ~a & ~b & ~cin; cout <= a & b | a & cin | b & cin;
